prompt: Create a processor that reads from Kafka topic 'orders' and writes to Atlas collection 'analytics.orders'

resource_naming_strategy.note: Appends Unix timestamp to processor name

test_prerequisites.workspace: Use existing workspace with Kafka and Atlas connections (e.g., ASPDemo)

pre_test_setup.action: Call atlas-streams-discover action='list-workspaces' to find workspace with required connections
Call atlas-streams-discover action='list-connections' and verify Kafka + Atlas connections exist

post_test_validation.action: Call atlas-streams-discover action='inspect-processor' to confirm processor exists

post_test_validation.expected: State is CREATED or STOPPED (not FAILED)

post_test_cleanup.action: Call atlas-streams-teardown resource='processor' to remove test processor

assertions.name: validates_connections_first
assertions.description: Calls atlas-streams-discover with action='list-connections' before creating processor

assertions.name: inspects_each_connection
assertions.description: Calls atlas-streams-discover with action='inspect-connection' for Kafka and Atlas connections

assertions.name: pipeline_ends_with_merge
assertions.description: Last pipeline stage is $merge (not $emit for Atlas)

assertions.name: dlq_configured
assertions.description: dlq parameter provided with connectionName, db, and coll fields

success_criteria.dlq_configured: DLQ parameter was provided in processor creation
